problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of DNA. DNA computing for massively parallel search directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
